description: This file defines the User entity class for a Java Spring Boot application using JPA. It maps to the 'users' table in the database and includes fields for id, email, passwordHash, emailVerified, and createdAt, along with associated constructors and getter/setter methods.

classes.name: User
classes.description: Entity class representing a user in the application, mapped to the 'users' database table with fields for ID, email, password hash, email verification status, and creation timestamp.

methods.name: User()
methods.description: Default constructor for initializing a new User object.

methods.name: User(String email, String passwordHash)
methods.description: Constructor for creating a User with specified email and password hash.

methods.name: isEmailVerified()
methods.description: Returns whether the user's email is verified.

methods.name: getCreatedAt()
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the user was created.
